name: Parallax Depth Card
description: Multi-layer card where each layer shifts by a different amount based on mouse position, creating a parallax depth illusion with optional 3D tilt.
accessibility_notes: parallax is decorative — content should be accessible without mouse

layers.description: Array of React nodes — layer 0 is deepest, last is topmost

depthScale.description: Max pixel shift per layer on mouse move

className.description: CSS class for the card container

use_cases: gaming UI card with depth layers
conflicts: requires mouse/hover — no effect on touch devices
many layers with high depthScale can cause overflow clipping
